message:
test(tui): add 26 edge-case tests for compose panel (br-2bbt.17)

Cover body line-join on backspace, cursor wrapping at line boundaries,
subject delete key, thread ID field, importance Enter/Right cycling,
max body length rejection, overlay area extremes, recipient cursor
bounds, Ctrl+A/D select/clear, render with error/sending state,
empty body navigation, body_offset past end, and default impl parity.

Total compose tests: 76 (was 50).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
